docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,000.00 FILED BY TSANG, JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT CHOY, RAYMOND ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-04-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TSANG, JOHN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CHOY, RAYMOND STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $40.00 SERVED AUG-10-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CHOY, RAYMOND
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-04-2015 - JUDGMENT.

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TSANG, JOHN ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-04-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-04-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---BANNIE CHOW. THE INTERPRETER'S IDENTIFICATION HAS BEEN VERIFIED, VIA EMPLOYEE BADGE OR OTHER DOCUMENTATION PROVING CERTIFICATION OR REGISTRATION AND PHOTO IDENTIFICATION. THE INTERPRETER HAS AN OATH ON FILE WITH THE COURT. NO COSTS, IFP FILED BY PLAINTIFF. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
COPYING FEES (2 PAGE) PAID BY DEFENDANT CHOY, RAYMOND
